scripts.start:docker: sh -c 'if [ "$npm_config_rebuild" = "true" ]; then cd apps/server && docker compose up --build; else cd apps/server && docker compose up; fi'
scripts.test: pnpm --filter server exec vitest run src/app/services/pr src/app/adapters src/app/api src/app/middlewares --exclude "**/*.integration.test.ts"
scripts.clean: pnpm turbo run clean && rm -rf node_modules
